summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Arcolia token-gated website completed successfully. All features working perfectly including landing page, wallet connection flow, Guild Hall test mode, member card display, navigation elements, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with beautiful medieval gate imagery
Enter Arcolia button works perfectly and shows wallet connect section
Wallet connect section appears correctly after clicking Enter Arcolia
Guild Hall test mode (?test=guild) loads and displays correctly
Member card shows all required information: status (Noble), username (0x1234...5678), ARCO balance (1,250)
The Library and Throne Room navigation buttons are visible and clickable
Coming Soon areas display with lock icons (Archives and Sanctum)
Leave Guild button successfully returns to gate page
Enter Guild Hall button appears at gate when access is granted
Disconnect button is available at gate page
All interactive elements trigger appropriate responses (alerts for coming soon features)
Mobile responsiveness works excellently on 390x844 viewport
All UI elements remain properly positioned and accessible on mobile
Test mode simulates connected wallet with 1250 ARCO tokens correctly
Member status calculation works correctly (Noble tier for 1250 tokens)
All data-testid attributes present for robust automated testing
